hypothesis: Augmenting universal MLIP training sets with a small (≤5% of total) curated collection of MOF-specific out-of-equilibrium configurations that sample underrepresented metal coordination geometries and adsorption-relevant long-range interactions will reduce the rate of unconverged structural optimizations and MD instabilities across diverse uMLIP architectures by at least 50% and halve the MAE in bulk modulus and heat capacity predictions on MOF test sets.
